arts.ttl: Kyle Walker delivers brutal seven-word put-down to team-mate Joao Felix as AC Milan slump to defeat at Napoli
arts.sum: Kyle Walker's honeymoon period at AC Milan is over and his frustrations got the better of him during Sunday's 2-1 defeat at Napoli. He started well in Italy but performances have dipped.

arts.ttl: Paratici heading towards Tottenham exit as Milan talks ongoing – report
arts.sum: Fabio Paratici’s talks with Milan are ongoing, and the Italian tactician is reportedly convinced about...
